---
name: Bug report
about: Something doesn't behave the way the docs say it should
title: "bug: "
labels: bug
---

## What happened

A clear description of the actual behavior.

## What you expected

What you thought would happen instead.

## Reproduction

A minimal repro is the fastest path to a fix. Link a StackBlitz/CodeSandbox, or paste the smallest snippet that shows it.

```tsx
import { toast, Toaster } from "@embertoast/react";

// …
```

## Environment

- `@embertoast/react` version:
- React version:
- Bundler / framework (Next, Vite, CRA, …):
- Browser + OS:

## Accessibility / motion (if relevant)

- [ ] Affects screen-reader announcement
- [ ] Affects focus behavior
- [ ] Reproduces with `prefers-reduced-motion: reduce`

## Notes

Anything else — console errors, a screen recording of the FLIP/swipe glitch, etc.
